sources.content:
TO: Board of Directors
FROM: Sarah Mitchell, VP Retail Operations
DATE: March 15, 2025

Our retail division completed Q1 with mixed results across our 28 stores in four regions. Total revenue reached $42.8 million, a 8% increase from Q4 2024. However, profit margins varied significantly by region:

- Northeast (9 stores): $15.2M revenue, 22% profit margin
- Southeast (7 stores): $11.4M revenue, 18% profit margin
- Midwest (6 stores): $8.7M revenue, 25% profit margin
- West (6 stores): $7.5M revenue, 15% profit margin

We have $8 million allocated for new store openings in Q2. Each new store requires $1.6 million initial investment. New stores can only be opened in regions with profit margins above 20% and where we currently have fewer than 10 stores.

REGIONAL MARKET CONDITIONS - Q2 2025 OUTLOOK

Northeast: Population density highest. Two competitors closed. Real estate: MODERATE. Lease: $42/sq ft. Consumer confidence: 78.

Southeast: Fastest growing (3.8% annually). Four new competitors. Real estate: HIGH. Lease: $28/sq ft. Consumer confidence: 71.

Midwest: Stable market, loyal customers. Limited competition. Real estate: HIGH. Lease: $22/sq ft. Consumer confidence: 75.

West: Highly competitive. Population growth 2.1%. Real estate: LOW. Lease: $55/sq ft. Consumer confidence: 69.

questions.text: What is the maximum number of new stores that can be opened in Q2?

statements: Midwest has highest margin and revenue/sqft
Only Northeast qualifies for new stores
West has lowest traffic and revenue/sqft

questions.text: Which region offers best ROI for new store?

statements.text: Phones had the highest sales in every quarter
Accessories showed the highest year-over-year growth rate
More than 60% of Laptop sales occurred in the second half of the year

corrected_graphics_interpretation.statement_text: The highest single-quarter revenue was [BLANK1] million dollars, and Product B's revenue pattern is best described as [BLANK2].
blank2_options: cyclical with peaks in Q2 and Q4
corrected_graphics_interpretation.blank2_correct: cyclical with peaks in Q2 and Q4

corrected_two_part_analysis.scenario: A project manager must assign a team leader and a technical specialist for a critical software deployment. The team leader must have management certification and availability for 6 weeks. The technical specialist needs cloud architecture experience and can work remotely. Budget constraint is $85,000 total for both positions.
shared_options: Alice: PMP certified, 8 weeks available, $280/hr, cloud expert
Bob: MBA, 6 weeks available, $220/hr, database specialist
Carol: PMP certified, 5 weeks available, $260/hr, cloud expert
David: Agile certified, 6 weeks available, $200/hr, cloud expert
Emma: PMP certified, 6 weeks available, $240/hr, security specialist
